description: B&M European Value Retail plc retails general merchandise products and groceries. The company operates a chain of stores under the B&M, Heron Foods, and B&M Express brand names in the United Kingdom, as well as stores under the B&M brand name in France. It also offers property management services. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Munsbach, Luxembourg.
